nasb.text: Then He said, “Do not come near here; remove your sandals from your feet, for the place on which you are standing is holy ground.”

esv.text: Then he said, “Do not come near; take your sandals off your feet, for the place on which you are standing is holy ground.”

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“不可過到這裡來；要把你腳上的鞋脫掉，因為你所站的地方是聖地。”

ccb.text: 上帝说：“别再靠近，脱下你脚上的鞋子，因为你所站的地方是圣地。”
